STLTECH: Record revenue, margin expansion, and net debt-free status achieved in Q1 FY27
data.description:
Record Q1 FY27 results with revenue up 87% YoY to INR 1,910 Cr, EBITDA margin at 20.8%, and PAT at INR 197 Cr. Order book hit INR 18,618 Cr, net debt eliminated post INR 1,500 Cr QIP, and major AI data center contracts secured. Strong industry tailwinds and innovation leadership support robust outlook.

Original document: Sterlite Technologies Limited [STLTECH] Interim report — Jul. 24 2026

Disclaimer
This is an AI-generated summary and may contain inaccuracies. Please verify any important information with the original source.

data.description:

data.title: ACC: Q1 FY27 profit fell to ₹147 crore amid lower sales, cost pressures, and strategic plant suspensions
data.description:
Revenue and profit declined sequentially due to lower sales and higher costs, with Q1 FY27 profit at ₹147 crore. Strategic actions included a 26% stake acquisition in a renewable energy firm and temporary plant suspensions to boost efficiency.

Original document: ACC Limited [ACC] Interim report — Jul. 28 2026

LAURUSLABS: Q1 FY27 delivered record revenue and profit growth, led by CDMO and generics momentum
data.description:

data.title: ARAMI: Q3 revenues down 5% to €559M; C2B sourcing up 27%; FY 2026 guidance reaffirmed
data.description:
Q3 FY 2026 revenues fell 5% year-over-year to €559 million, with refurbished volumes up 3% and pre-registered volumes down 20%. C2B sourcing surged 27%, now one-third of B2C deliveries. FY 2026 guidance and medium-term targets are confirmed.

data.description:

LAURUSLABS: Strong revenue and profit growth, with EPS more than doubling year-over-year
data.description:

data.description:

data.title: HINDZINC: Record revenue, EBITDA, and net profit driven by strong zinc and silver performance
data.description:
Record quarterly results with revenue up 77% YoY, EBITDA up 109% YoY, and net profit up 145% YoY. Operational excellence, cost leadership, and capacity expansion drive growth, while silver and zinc remain key profitability contributors.
